name: family-leaderboard
description: A zero-cost family leaderboard for bedtime and healthy-eating habits, on Cloudflare Workers + D1.

scripts.dev: npm run -s setup && wrangler dev -c wrangler.local.toml
scripts.db:schema: npm run -s setup && wrangler d1 execute family-leaderboard -c wrangler.local.toml --local --file=schema.sql
scripts.db:seed: npm run -s setup && wrangler d1 execute family-leaderboard -c wrangler.local.toml --local --file=seed.example.sql
